text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies, Mejiro
Dober surprises herself with how calm she is,
despite it being her first G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wants to fulfill her promise to Mejiro Bright,
she'll need to do well in this race and gain the
confidence to keep moving forward. Determined,
she heads to the track.
